mapper.select:
select elemntcode as elemntcode, elemntchname as elementChname, iselemnt as isElement, sameid as sameId, elemntobject as elementObject, elemntrule as elementRule, createmode as createMode, author as author, moddate as modDate from synlte.entity_element
(upper(elemntchname) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))

select l.code_text as id, count(e.elemntobject) as value from DSM_ALL_CODE_DATA l left join synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT e on e.elemntobject = l.code_value where l.code_id = 'ELEMENTOBJECT' group by l.code_text

select r.code_value as id, r.code_text as name, case when l.value is null then 0 else l.value end value from (select elemntobject as id, count(*) as value from (select distinct o.objectid, x.label, x.elemntobject from synlte.object o left join (select distinct objf.objectid, ee.fieldid, ee.label, ee.elemntobject from synlte.objectfield objf right join (select elemntobject, elemntcode as fieldid, elemntchname as label from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT where createmode = '1') ee on objf.fieldid = ee.fieldid) x on o.objectid = x.objectid) where label is not null group by elemntobject) l right join DSM_ALL_CODE_DATA r on l.id = r.code_value where r.code_id = 'ELEMENTOBJECT' order by r.code_value

select elemntcode as value, case when x.value is null then elemntchname || '(' || 0 || ')' else elemntchname || '(' || x.value || ')' end as label from (select * from synlte.entity_element where elemntobject = #{elementObject} and createmode = '1') ente left join (select label, count(*) as value from (select distinct o.objectid, x.label from synlte.object o left join (select distinct objf.objectid, ee.fieldid, ee.label from synlte.objectfield objf right join (select elemntcode as fieldid, elemntchname as label from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT where createmode = '1') ee on objf.fieldid = ee.fieldid) x on o.objectid = x.objectid and x.label is not null) where label is not null group by label) x on ente.elemntchname = x.label
